case_title: SAN FRANCISCO NETWORK MINISTRIES VS KANTAYENE BRANDE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KANTAYENE BRANDE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO NETWORK MINISTRIES AS TO DEFENDANT KANTAYENE BRANDE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO NETWORK MINISTRIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KANTAYENE BRANDE $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $18.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $668.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
